privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic data cleaning exercise using a programmatically generated home inventory spreadsheet with 40 items in ODS format. The dataset contains 13 high-value items (>$1000) distributed across 5 standard categories. Depreciation rates are consistent: Electronics 20%/year (max 80%), Furniture 10%/year (max 50%), Appliances 15%/year (max 70%), Jewelry 0%, and Tools 8%/year (max 40%). Verification requires 70% pass rate (5 of 7 criteria met), including ≥95% category standardization, ≥90% date normalization, <5% depreciation formula error rate, and ≥90% high-value item documentation flagging. Task has 180-second timeout with 15 maximum steps.
